steps.title: Identify the key factor in the hybrid's success
steps.content: Perovskite and silicon capture different parts of the solar spectrum: blue and red, respectively. This complementarity explains why the combination reaches 29.5%, far exceeding either component's ~18–22% efficiency.

steps.title: Apply this insight to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice A matches this insight perfectly: it names more of the solar spectrum as the source of efficiency. The other three contradict the evidence, overreach without basis, or request research not indicated. That matches choice A — A is correct.
